options.name: <target_pin_list>
options.description: List of pins where the generated clock assertion is applied

options.name: -add
options.description: Multiple clocks on the same source

options.name: -combinational
options.description: Consider only combinational paths for latency

options.name: -divide_by
options.description: Factor by which frequency of source clock is divided for new frequency

options.name: -duty_cycle
options.description: Sets the duty cycle (high pulse width or clock period). The number ( percent )is between 0 and 100 (float, optional)

options.name: -edge_shift
options.description: Amount of shift for each edge in -edge_list option

options.name: -edges
options.description: List of edges from source clock that for derived clock

options.name: -master_clock
options.description: Generates a target clock from the specified clock name

options.name: -multiply_by
options.description: Factor by which frequency of source clock is multiplied for new frequency

options.name: -source
options.description: Source pin from which clock shall be derived

options.name: -source_invert
options.description: Inverts the polarity of master clock at specified source pin
